justification: All pass criteria met: stripe wildcard identified as Critical, jsonwebtoken CVE flagged as Critical with specific CVE reference, 5 of 5 risks identified (stripe, jsonwebtoken, crypto-random-string, left-pad, moment), safe_to_deploy is false, and severities are differentiated (Critical for stripe/jsonwebtoken/crypto-random-string, Important for moment/left-pad, plus bonus pg finding).

observations.text: All 5 expected dependency risks identified — perfect coverage
Stripe wildcard correctly rated Critical with concrete reproduction scenario showing version divergence between pods
jsonwebtoken CVE-2022-23529 cited by name with CVSS score — demonstrates real vulnerability knowledge
crypto-random-string ESM-only issue explained with exact error message and practical fix options
left-pad supply chain risk noted with historical context about the 2016 incident
moment.js deprecation flagged with migration alternatives
Bonus finding: pg version range concern adds extra value
moment.js placed under important_issues rather than suggestions — rubric expects it as Suggestion severity, though this is a minor severity inflation
Actionable fixes provided for every finding with time estimates
Confidence section appropriately notes the CJS assumption for the ESM finding
